imageUrl.label: Image URL
imageUrl.description: URL of the image to display in the album

bitmap-patterns.title: Bitmap Patterns
bitmap-patterns.description: Demonstrating using custom classes to create bitmap patterns. See /utils/pre-satori.ts for more details. Edit this recipe at /app/recipes/screens/bitmap-patterns.tsx

wikipedia.title: Wikipedia Article
wikipedia.description: A component that displays random Wikipedia articles.

bitcoin-price.title: Crypto Price Tracker
bitcoin-price.description: A component that displays the current cryptocurrency price and market data. Supports any cryptocurrency available on CoinGecko.

cryptoSymbol.label: Cryptocurrency Symbol
cryptoSymbol.description: The CoinGecko ID of the cryptocurrency (e.g., 'bitcoin', 'ethereum', 'cardano'). Defaults to 'bitcoin'.

weather.title: Weather Forecast
weather.description: A component that displays current weather data from Open-Meteo API. Supports configurable locations via latitude/longitude or location name.

location.label: Location
location.description: City or place name to fetch weather for

responsive-example.title: Responsive Example
responsive-example.description: An example component demonstrating responsive design patterns and layout techniques for bitmap displays.

not-found.title: Not Found Recipe
not-found.description: A fallback recipe displayed when a requested recipe is not found.

ics-calendar.title: ICS Multi-Column Calendar
ics-calendar.description: Displays up to 5 ICS/iCalendar feeds as side-by-side schedule columns. Only columns with configured URLs are shown. Supports recurring events.

calendarUrl1.label: Calendar 1 URL
calendarUrl1.description: ICS/iCalendar URL for the first calendar column

calendarName1.label: Calendar 1 Name
calendarName1.description: Display name for calendar 1 (auto-detected from ICS if empty)

calendarUrl2.label: Calendar 2 URL
calendarUrl2.description: ICS/iCalendar URL for the second calendar column

calendarName2.label: Calendar 2 Name
calendarName2.description: Display name for calendar 2 (auto-detected from ICS if empty)

calendarUrl3.label: Calendar 3 URL
calendarUrl3.description: ICS/iCalendar URL for the third calendar column

calendarName3.label: Calendar 3 Name
calendarName3.description: Display name for calendar 3 (auto-detected from ICS if empty)

calendarUrl4.label: Calendar 4 URL
calendarUrl4.description: ICS/iCalendar URL for the fourth calendar column

calendarName4.label: Calendar 4 Name
calendarName4.description: Display name for calendar 4 (auto-detected from ICS if empty)

calendarUrl5.label: Calendar 5 URL
calendarUrl5.description: ICS/iCalendar URL for the fifth calendar column

calendarName5.label: Calendar 5 Name
calendarName5.description: Display name for calendar 5 (auto-detected from ICS if empty)

daysAhead.label: Days ahead to show
daysAhead.description: How many days of upcoming events to fetch (1-30)
